system.name: mitmproxy
system.description: Interactive, SSL/TLS-capable intercepting proxy for HTTP/1, HTTP/2, WebSockets, TCP, UDP, and DNS

people.name: Developer / Security Researcher
people.description: Uses mitmproxy to intercept, inspect, modify, and replay network traffic for debugging or security testing

people.name: Addon Author
people.description: Writes Python scripts using the mitmproxy addon API to automate traffic manipulation

external_systems.name: mitmproxy_rs
external_systems.description: Rust extension providing WireGuard transport, local redirect modes, and UDP/DNS handling

external_systems.name: Target HTTP Server
external_systems.description: The upstream server whose traffic is being intercepted and proxied

external_systems.name: Client Application
external_systems.description: Browser or HTTP client configured to route traffic through the proxy

relationships.description: Controls proxy via console UI, CLI, or web browser interface
Registers Python addon scripts that hook into the request/response lifecycle
Routes HTTP/HTTPS traffic through the proxy
Forwards intercepted traffic to the upstream server
Delegates WireGuard, local redirect, and raw UDP/DNS transport to Rust extension
